completed_slice: Model stale aggregate queue state and newer owner-authored append-only updates as temporally linked records instead of overwriting either source.

checks: ACTIVE_QUEUE updated_at is earlier than both append-only queue update timestamps
append-only update owners match their queue item owners
neither update claims required deployment evidence is complete
artifact preserves observed, proposed, superseded, and unresolved states separately
artifact contains no private chat, health, credential, or identifying personal content

limits: This artifact does not mutate or replace ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
The proposed precedence rule is not yet enforced by a deterministic reconciler.
Commit existence and file content establish repository history, not runtime or deployment truth.
